series_metadata.series_title: Comptroller''''''''s Monthly Traffic and Toll Audit Reports
series_metadata.series_description: A monthly file that contains the following traffic, revenue and toll audit reports generated by the computer: Traffic Density Report monthly year-to-date (prepared quarterly); Origin-Destination-Class reports (ODC)daily summary monthly detail and summary year-to-date (prepared quarterly); Tandem Trailer Combinations Report monthly yearly; Non-Revenue Report Summary monthly; Commonality Report monthly year-to-date (prepared quarterly); Interchange Comparative Report monthly; Charge Account History Listing yearly; Vendor Name & Address Listing yearly printout showing amounts paid to vendors; Open Accounts Receivable Register month-end; Charge Account Invoice Register semi-monthly.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Monthly reports retain for 5 years, Electronic: Trash
